# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: my-elasticsearch-snapshots
        region: us-east-1
        access_key: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}
        secret_key: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}
        chunk_size: 100mb
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
    filesystem:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /backups/elasticsearch
        chunk_size: 100mb
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
  schedule:
    daily:
      cron: "0 0 * * *"
      settings:
        schedule: "0 0 * * *"
        repository: "s3"
        retention:
          expire_after: "30d"
          min_count: 1
          max_count: 30
    weekly:
      cron: "0 0 * * 0"
      settings:
        schedule: "0 0 * * 0"
        repository: "filesystem"
        retention:
          expire_after: "1y"
          min_count: 1
          max_count: 52
  retention:
    policy:
      daily:
        expire_after: "7d"
        min_count: 1
        max_count: 7
      weekly:
        expire_after: "30d"
        min_count: 1
        max_count: 4
      monthly:
        expire_after: "1y"
        min_count: 1
        max_count: 12
  restore:
    settings:
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      rename_pattern: "index_(.+)"
      rename_replacement: "restored_index_$1"
  cluster:
    snapshot:
      enabled: true
      settings:
        max_concurrent_snapshots: 1
        max_concurrent_recoveries: 2
        max_concurrent_snapshot_operations: 1
        max_concurrent_restore_operations: 1
